topic: plan cache patch 从 Percona 8.0.43-34 移植到 MySQL 8.0.36
notes: 需补 sql_lex 状态位和 mysqld.cc SHOW_FUNC helper
new_rules: plan cache 相关 patch 先做参考 patch 选择
prepared statement/optimizer patch 必做针对性 SQL 验证
若故障出现在 mysql_stmt_store_result，优先检查服务端结果集元数据与生命周期

topic: aarch64 charset sve optimization port to TXSQL 8.0.30
auto_apply_summary: 8.0.36 patch applied almost entirely with one reject in strings/CMakeLists.txt; additional micro-fix removed contradictory odd-dstlen assert in strings/ctype-uca.cc
manual_fix_points: manually merged SVE ACLE probe and compile flags into strings/CMakeLists.txt
removed dstlen parity assert in strings/ctype-uca.cc while preserving odd-length fallback
built component_test_utf8mb4_sve, strings_utf8-t, strings_strnxfrm-t independently due unrelated full-build failures
functional_coverage: strings_strnxfrm-t passed 73/73 after ctype-uca assert fix
blocking_issues: router harness requires <charconv> with current GCC 7.3 toolchain
bundled protobuf 3.19.4 fails in constant-expression codegen paths

topic: 非对齐内存访问优化从 MySQL/Percona 8.0.x 移植到 TXSQL 8.0.30
selection_reason: 8.0.43-34 是该能力的原始 patch，语义最完整
8.0.30 与 8.0.25/8.0.43 在 rem0cmp.cc 和 alignment-t.cc 上结构差异很小
8.0.36 的 0005-myconvert-non-aligned-mem.patch 已偏向 TXSQL 当前 SIMD 分支，不适合作为主参考
目标树已存在未提交的 AArch64 SIMD my_convert 重构，需保留现有结构并手工把 patch 语义补到 neon/sve 执行路径
notes: tmp/TXSQL 是脏工作树，strings/ctype.cc 和多处 strings 新文件已有用户本地修改
普通 git diff 无法覆盖未跟踪的 ctype-neon-opt.cc / ctype-sve-opt.cc 改动，已额外生成完整补丁文件
GenError 初次失败因 comp_err 运行时缺少 GCC 12 libstdc++，通过补充 LD_LIBRARY_PATH 修复
new_rules: 若目标树已把通用实现下沉到架构专用 *.cc include 文件，不能只看 git apply 成功率，必须确认 patch 是否命中真实执行路径
单独编译 innodb 对象前要先补齐 GenError 等生成头文件，否则会误判为源码移植失败
使用自带 GCC 工具链构建 MySQL 8.0.x 时，生成器程序也要继承对应 LD_LIBRARY_PATH

topic: Lightweight AArch64 NEON ASCII fast path for my_convert()
reference_selection_notes: Selected the local AArch64 charset SIMD patch because it is the only available patch with direct my_convert() coverage; excluded full framework port to keep changes within strings/ctype.cc and avoid helper/dispatch additions.
manual_fix_points: Reused existing ASCII-compatible my_convert() flow and inserted a 16-byte AArch64 NEON prefix loop before the legacy 4-byte fast path.
Kept non-ASCII handling on the original scalar fallback path without introducing runtime dispatch or extra build flags.

verification.standalone_compile: passed with build-debug compile flags into /tmp/ctype.cc.neon-test.o

new_rules: For low-risk SIMD backports on AArch64, prefer compile-time NEON in the hot function over importing the full helper/dispatch framework when ASCII-only fast path is sufficient.
On AArch64 GCC, NEON intrinsics in arm_neon.h compile under the existing armv8-a build flags, so extra CMake changes are unnecessary unless SVE is added.

topic: Lightweight AArch64 NEON ASCII fast path for my_convert()
reference_selection_notes: Used the local AArch64 charset SIMD patch only as a semantic reference for my_convert() hot-path acceleration; excluded its helper files and dispatch framework to keep the port limited to strings/ctype.cc.
manual_fix_points: Inserted an AArch64-only 16-byte NEON ASCII prefix loop directly in my_convert() before the legacy 4-byte fast path.
Preserved the existing scalar fallback for non-ASCII data and all generic platform code paths.
Avoided CMake changes because the existing armv8 build flags already compile arm_neon.h intrinsics on AArch64.

verification.compile: make -C bld-debug strings/CMakeFiles/strings_objlib.dir/ctype.cc.o passed; standalone g++ compile with build flags also passed earlier.
verification.install_binary_version: build/install/bin/mysqld --version passed with GCC 12 runtime LD_LIBRARY_PATH.
verification.startup: initialize-insecure, daemon startup, mysqladmin ping and SQL verification passed on port 3409 with mysqlx disabled.
verification.shutdown: server shutdown still ends with a threadpool-related SIGSEGV in tp_end(); A/B test with unpatched binary reproduced the same crash, so it is treated as an independent pre-existing issue.

sql_coverage: SELECT VERSION() AS version, @@port AS port, @@socket AS socket
new_rules: For low-risk AArch64 SIMD backports, a compile-time NEON ASCII-prefix fast path inside the hot function is sufficient when the full helper/dispatch framework would exceed review scope.
When validating TXSQL builds produced by the local GCC 12 toolchain, preload the matching libstdc++ runtime via LD_LIBRARY_PATH before treating startup failures as server regressions.
If shutdown crashes in tp_end() after Shutdown complete, verify against an unpatched control binary before attributing the issue to unrelated string-path changes.
